name: Sleep Optimizer
description: Analyze sleep habits and get personalized improvement advice

agents.name: Sleep Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze sleep patterns and identify issues
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the reported sleep data: bedtime, wake time, sleep quality, disruptions, caffeine/screen habits, and environment. Identify issues affecting sleep quality.

agents.name: Sleep Coach
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a personalized sleep improvement plan with: sleep hygiene audit, specific recommendations ranked by impact, ideal sleep schedule based on chronotype, evening routine design, bedroom environment optimization, and a 2-week gradual improvement plan. Cite sleep science research.

suggestion_card.title: Sleep Optimizer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Improve your sleep quality
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Help me improve my sleep: [sleep habits]

author: agentfactory
